notes: Full rescan (deep delta) on 2026-06-24 over the 2026-06-22 lean suite. Deltas since the ead5eff doc refresh: (1) NEW credential vault — api/credentials.py, a GLOBAL `credentials` table (email + PLAINTEXT password, X-Api-Key auth not session, password echoed by owner request, no-store reads), created tenant-scoped (e7d2c9a4b1f8) then de-scoped to one global table (b3f1a7c9d2e4) recovering stranded rows; CREDENTIALS_API_KEY config var added. (2) Gift-key credits — GiftKey.credits admin-chosen at mint (f4b9c2e7a1d3); days and/or credits, credits-only allowed. (3) Per-message CC dedup — uq_responses_session_msg_cc(capture_session_id, chat_id, message_id, text) (d1f4a8e2c5b6) so Datos CC mirrors Aprobadas; this corrected stale 'tenant-lifetime uq_responses_session_cc' wording in data-models.md/index.md/project-context.md (ead5eff was authored just before the d1f4a8e2c5b6 fix). (4) Owner monitoring panel at /admin/monitor backed by GET /api/observability (per-tenant send activity + telegram/flood/unmatched/watchdog/admission slices). (5) Discreet version badge from package.json. Alembic head now b3f1a7c9d2e4 (34 migrations, 18 tables). Untracked root amazon_login.py and dsbuild/ are scratch/design-sync tooling, NOT production backend/frontend — excluded. Legacy root app remains dead code, excluded.
